data_quality: unusable — LLM-generated responses, no structured route database exposed
extraction_method: web scraping of landing page only; app requires interaction
notes: Komyut AI app (komyut-app.vercel.app / komyut.ph) appears to be an LLM-powered transit chatbot, not a structured routing engine. No GTFS data, no route database, no API, and no stop coordinates are publicly accessible. The landing page shows illustrative example routes (SM MOA → Makati CBD: Jeepney→MRT→Bus 60min ₱41, or Walk→Bus 55min ₱25) but these are marketing copy, not extractable structured data. An ICP (Internet Computer Protocol) MVP version exists at 236jx-viaaa-aaaae-acpqq-cai.icp0.io, suggesting Web3/hackathon origins. Zero routes extracted. Do not use as primary data source for GTFS development.
